rawFiles.name: datahub-un-locode-code-list.csv
rawFiles.notes: Downloaded by data-automation collect-transport-sources into an ignored local output directory.

transforms: Map UN/LOCODE function codes to transportModes and locationTypes.
Hold ambiguous or suspicious rows for manual review.
reviewNotes: The initial import accepted 13 Syria rows: 7 standalone public transport/trade locations and 6 airport identifier merges into accepted OurAirports records. Current canonical data retains 12 UN/LOCODE rows after Al Thaurah Airport (SOR) was removed for identity, status, and safety review. The official 2025-1 production package and 2026-06-16 pre-release were later reviewed and contained the same 19 Syria location codes plus the country header row; no new Syria UN/LOCODE rows were found.
